text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Ace, what are you looking at?

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
Nn? Oh, just checking some photos I took. I got a
pretty interesting shot of the mansion!

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
Y'know the creepy place everyone's been talking
about? The haunted mansion? The really
run-down place deep in the forest by the park!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I didn't know that, actually. Heh, but it
definitely sounds up your alley!

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Everyone was saying how they were too
scared to go, so I just couldn't help it!

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
I didn't wanna trespass or anything, so I just did a
lap around the perimeter. None of the rooms
were lit, so I couldn't really see through the
windows.

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
I was gonna just leave, but then I felt eyes on my
back. And when I turned around—

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
Every single window was lined with dolls! They
were all facing out, so it felt like a sea of little
eyes watching me.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Rows of dolls at every window? That's quite the sight. Is that the neat photo you took?

text_block_list.name: Katsuragi Ace
text_block_list.text:
It is, but that's where this gets even spookier.
There's not a single doll visible in the shot. Weird,
right?

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Yikes, maybe the place really is haunted. You'll
have to bring me over sometime!
